title: thymus capitatus
intro: Thymus capitatus, also known as Thyme, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thymus capitatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and congestion. Thyme can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
